models.ExportDashboard: The top-level export interface combining metadata, section toggles, export actions, history, and preview data for both profiles.
models.ExportSection: A toggleable section of the estimate output with per-profile inclusion controls.
models.ExportMetadata: Version and status metadata for the estimate being exported.
models.ExportAction: An export action (PDF, Markdown, Web Link) with status tracking.
models.ExportHistoryEntry: A record of a previously completed export.
models.PreviewData: Rendered preview content for a specific export profile.

sections.description: Technical and business assumptions per feature

notes.internal: Review notes: EHR integration hours were adjusted upward based on MedConnect experience. Team expanded to 7 with DevOps addition. Safari WebRTC risk added. Overall confidence raised to 78% based on team familiarity with healthcare domain.
notes.client: This estimate is based on the PRD provided on April 14, 2026. Hours reflect our best assessment given current project understanding. Final scope and timeline are subject to clarification of open questions noted in this document. All estimates assume the prerequisites listed in the Assumptions section are met.

internalPreview.projectSummary: A mid-to-large healthcare portal with HIPAA compliance requirements, complex role-based access, and integrations with two external EHR systems. The feature set is well-defined but several areas carry significant technical uncertainty. Reviewed and adjusted by Carlos Mendez on April 16, 2026.

features.name: Patient Dashboard
features.description: Personalized landing page showing upcoming appointments, recent lab results, active prescriptions, and unread messages.
assumptions: Dashboard widgets are pre-defined, not user-configurable.
Lab results are pulled from the EHR.

features.name: Appointment Scheduling
features.description: Book, reschedule, and cancel appointments with provider availability lookup and timezone handling.
assumptions: Provider availability from EHR scheduling API.
features.adjustmentReasoning: EHR scheduling APIs are inconsistent across providers. Bumped hours based on MedConnect experience.

features.name: Secure Messaging
features.description: HIPAA-compliant messaging with attachment support and read receipts.
assumptions: Attachments limited to images and PDFs under 10MB.
features.adjustmentReasoning: Well-understood territory — our encryption module handles this. Downgraded complexity and trimmed hours.

features.name: Telehealth Video Visits
features.description: Browser-based video consultations with waiting room, screen sharing, and recording consent.
features.adjustmentReasoning: Bumped to very high — consent flow intersects HIPAA, Safari WebRTC issues expected.

features.name: Insurance Verification
features.description: Real-time eligibility verification via payer API.

features.name: Authentication & RBAC
features.description: MFA, role-based access control, HIPAA-compliant session management.

features.name: Lab Results Viewer
features.description: EHR lab results with trend charts, reference ranges, and AI explanations.

features.name: Prescription Management
features.description: View prescriptions, request refills, receive renewal reminders.

risks.title: EHR API instability and rate limits
risks.mitigation: Caching layer, circuit breaker, negotiate rate limits early.

risks.title: Telehealth scope creep
risks.mitigation: Lock v1 to 1:1, get explicit client sign-off.

risks.title: Delayed EHR sandbox credentials
risks.mitigation: Mock data first, contractual SLA for delivery.

risks.title: Healthcare domain expertise gap
risks.mitigation: Healthcare-experienced tech lead or domain consultant.

risks.title: Safari WebRTC compatibility
risks.mitigation: Week 2 spike, phone audio fallback, iOS Safari testing.

assumptions: Client provides EHR sandbox credentials within the first two weeks.
HIPAA compliance review handled by third-party auditor.
Telehealth via existing SDK, not custom WebRTC.
Design system and brand assets provided upfront.
Mobile experience is responsive web, not native.

clientPreview.projectSummary: A comprehensive patient portal with appointment scheduling, secure messaging, telehealth video visits, insurance verification, and integration with your existing EHR system. This estimate reflects our team's assessment based on the requirements document provided.

features.name: Patient Dashboard
features.description: Personalized landing page showing upcoming appointments, recent lab results, active prescriptions, and unread messages.
assumptions: Dashboard widgets are pre-defined, not user-configurable.

features.name: Appointment Scheduling
features.description: Book, reschedule, and cancel appointments with provider availability lookup and timezone handling.
assumptions: Provider availability from EHR scheduling API.

features.name: Secure Messaging
features.description: HIPAA-compliant messaging with attachment support and read receipts.
assumptions: Attachments limited to images and PDFs.

features.name: Telehealth Video Visits
features.description: Browser-based video consultations with waiting room and screen sharing.

features.name: Insurance Verification
features.description: Real-time eligibility verification via payer API.

features.name: Authentication & RBAC
features.description: Multi-factor authentication and role-based access control with compliant session management.

features.name: Lab Results Viewer
features.description: Lab results display with trend charts and reference ranges.

features.name: Prescription Management
features.description: View prescriptions, request refills, and receive renewal reminders.

risks.title: EHR API integration complexity
risks.mitigation: We will build resilient integration patterns and begin testing early.

risks.title: Telehealth feature scope
risks.mitigation: V1 focuses on core 1:1 video visits. Advanced features deferred to subsequent phases.

risks.title: EHR access timeline
risks.mitigation: We will begin with simulated data while credentials are provisioned.

risks.title: Compliance review timeline
risks.mitigation: Compliance review runs in parallel with development.

assumptions: EHR sandbox access provided within the first two weeks.
Compliance review handled by your existing auditor.
Video visits powered by established SDK.
Design assets and brand guidelines provided at project start.
Mobile experience delivered as responsive web application.
disclaimers: This estimate is based on the requirements document provided on April 14, 2026.
Final hours and timeline are subject to clarification of open questions noted in this document.
All estimates assume the prerequisites listed in the Assumptions section are met.
Hours represent our best assessment and may vary based on scope changes or unforeseen technical challenges.
